The primary bug causing the test failure is in the `num1>1` branch missing the last digit.]

52.reason: [This loop starts by incrementing `i` before printing, so it skips the character right after the first non-zero digit. For example, if `i` points to first non-zero at position k, it then does `i++` and prints from k+1 onward, missing the digit at k+0 after the decimal point. Should print current `i` first or adjust loop structure. However, in the given test case, this branch isn't taken, so not the cause of the specific WA.]
